headline.purpose: Page titles in wizard, pricing, reports.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition-colors on buttons and links (150–250ms).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — assessment start, continue, checkout.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; background: #10b981; color: #020617; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #34d399; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #020617, 0 0 0 4px #10b981; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions — guides, back navigation alternatives.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid #334155; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: #f1f5f9; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #64748b; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #020617, 0 0 0 4px #10b981; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Feature cards, pricing tiers, result blocks.
components.html:
Deterministic classification

Risk tier decided by a versioned rule engine with full legal source trace.
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #1e293b; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5); padding: 24px; color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #94a3b8; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form fields in compliance checker and wizard.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; } .ds-field-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 4px; border: 1px solid #334155; border-radius: 8px; background: #0f172a; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 1rem; color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #10b981; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #020617, 0 0 0 4px #10b981; }

components.name: Marketing Nav
components.description: Top header links on marketing and app shells.
components.html: AI Act NavigatorFree checkPricing
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 16px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b; background: #020617; } .ds-nav-brand { font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #f1f5f9; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-brand:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #cbd5e1; text-decoration: none; margin-left: 24px; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible, .ds-nav-brand:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #020617, 0 0 0 4px #10b981; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Uppercase tracked section label above heroes.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #34d399; }

narrative.overview: A dark, focused compliance workstation — not a marketing gimmick. Surfaces read as panels on a regulatory canvas: deep slate backgrounds, crisp borders, emerald used sparingly for action and status. Typography is Geist throughout; hierarchy comes from weight and size, not decorative display faces.
keyCharacteristics: Dark canvas as default; light canvas only for long-form pSEO reading
Geist Sans + Geist Mono; fixed rem type scale
1px slate borders on cards; tonal layering instead of shadows
Full interactive states on every control

rules.name: The Emerald Rarity Rule
rules.body: Accent green appears on ≤10% of any screen. If everything is emerald, nothing is actionable.

rules.name: The Canvas Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Background flows Regulatory Canvas → Panel Surface → Border Line. Never skip a layer without reason.

rules.name: The Geist-Only Rule
rules.body: Do not set font-family: Arial on body. Geist variables from layout.tsx are canonical.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section labels use uppercase tracked emerald (text-label + text-emerald-400).

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows do not appear at rest. Elevation is border + background tint only.

dos: Do use CSS variables from globals.css for new surfaces.
Do wrap flows in AppShell + PageContainer for consistent width.
Do ship hover, focus-visible, disabled, and error states on every interactive control.
Do use emerald only for primary actions, selection, eyebrows, and risk/status emphasis.
donts: Don't use neon accents, purple gradients, glassmorphism, or Powered by AI marketing tropes.
Don't imply LLM-decided legal outcomes in visual hierarchy.
Don't override Geist with Arial on body.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or nested cards.
Don't put display-sized type on UI labels, buttons, or data tables.
